policy.rollback_expectation: Every external target needs its own rollback notes before execution.

purpose: Prepare staged local-to-external rollout without auto-pushing changes.

stages.name: local_compliance
stages.note: External sync planning should happen only after local structure and docs are in a good state.

stages.name: prepare_external_sync
stages.note: This stage prepares target-specific plans only. It does not push or deploy.

planned_actions: create or verify remote repository linkage
prepare branch, commit, and push plan

stages.name: approve_and_execute
stages.note: GitHub, Vercel, and Supabase actions must each be explicitly approved before execution.
